title: Telegram Bot API - Updating messages and editMessageText
notes: The Bot API documents editMessageText as the method for editing text messages.
The edited message text is limited to 1-4096 characters after entity parsing.
The terminal watch message uses this method through Telegraf's editMessageText wrapper, so every unnecessary edit is a Telegram API call.

title: Telegram Bot API - Paid Broadcasts
notes: Telegram documents a default broadcast limit of 30 messages per second, with a paid option for higher broadcast throughput.
The issue is not a broadcast feature, but reducing repeated editMessageText calls lowers pressure on Telegram rate limits and bot throughput.

title: link-assistant/hive-mind PR 551 - Add Telegram terminal watch command
notes: Introduced /terminal_watch and the terminal-sized live message concept.
The current issue is a regression in the watch loop behavior, not in the command surface.

title: link-assistant/hive-mind PR 1721 - Fix /terminal_watch uploading log file in General topic
notes: Recent related change kept final terminal watch message edits but removed automatic log document uploads.
The fix for issue 1750 preserves that behavior.
